title: Ask Lovecraft Talks Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Ask Lovecraft Talks Evangelion             Quote Post by Ray » Wed Dec 07, 2016 7:16 pm This guy makes a series of entertaining YouTube videos where he answers questions in character as HP Lovecraft. In this particular video he talks about Evangelion. Or rather how he thinks Lovecraft would have received Evangelion. https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=KClFQCfZx-0

[]: Re: Ask Lovecraft Talks Evangelion             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Dec 07, 2016 7:49 pm He doesn't have enough of a fivehead to be ol' Howie Philldawg.
